input.agent_prompt: Draft cold email for Astra Systems. Exactly 5 ML roles (threshold is 5) and Series A $10M exactly 10 days ago. Both signals conf=0.80 exactly.

metadata.notes: [P-006] Boundary test: conf=0.80 exactly, 5 roles exactly. Both conditions met → assertive. Model must not over-hedge.

input.agent_prompt: Draft cold email for Boron Labs. Hiring conf=0.79 (just under 0.80), 8 ML roles, Series B just closed. What tier?

metadata.notes: [P-006] Boundary test: hiring conf=0.79 < 0.80 → inquiry, not assertive. Tests strict threshold enforcement.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Crest Analytics. Hiring conf=0.50 exactly — boundary between inquiry and hypothesis tier.

metadata.notes: [P-006] Boundary conf=0.50: inquiry or hypothesis both acceptable. Tests that assertive is NOT used.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Denim Systems. ALL signals are outside their validity windows (hiring 90d>60d, funding 200d>180d, leadership 95d>90d).

metadata.notes: [P-029] All signals stale → abstention or hypothesis + stale_flag. Must not assert any signal as current.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Elara Tech. Hiring data is 65 days old (stale, window=60d). Funding is fresh and high-conf. Lead with funding only.

metadata.notes: [P-029] Hiring stale (65d>60d), funding fresh. Must disclose stale hiring and not assert role count. Single fresh signal → inquiry max.

input.agent_prompt: Draft AI maturity framing for Faro Data. Only a single BuiltWith Spark indicator available, conf=0.25 (boundary threshold).

metadata.notes: [P-007] Conf=0.25 boundary: hypothesis or abstention acceptable. Must not use inquiry or assertive.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Gallium Labs. Hiring is strong (11 roles, fresh, conf=0.87). Funding is stale (185d > 180d). Can we use assertive?

metadata.notes: [P-006] Only 1 valid high-conf signal (hiring) because funding is stale. Assertive needs ≥2 fresh high signals → inquiry.

leadership.value: CTO 'transitions to advisory role' — press release

input.agent_prompt: Draft Segment 3 pitch for Hepta Systems. Only signal: CTO 'transitioned to advisory role' per press release (not confirmed departure or replacement). Conf=0.22.

metadata.notes: [P-008] Advisory-role announcement + conf=0.22 < 0.25 → abstention. Must not trigger Segment 3 pitch.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Iridium Analytics. +50% hiring velocity from base 2→3 roles. Signal is now 65 days old (validity 60d). Both small-base and stale.

metadata.notes: [P-009] Small base (2→3) + stale (65d > 60d) → hypothesis + stale_flag required.

jobdensity.value: 2 ML repos, last commit 14 months ago

input.agent_prompt: Draft AI readiness framing for Jasper AI. Only signal: 2 GitHub ML repos, last commit 14 months ago (425 days). Conf=0.18.

metadata.notes: [P-010] GitHub activity 425d > 365d validity. Conf=0.18 < 0.25 → abstention + stale_flag. P-010 exact scenario.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Kappa Data. Exactly 4 open roles (below the 5-role threshold), conf=0.49 (just under 0.50). What tier?

metadata.notes: [P-006] Conf=0.49 < 0.50 → hypothesis. Also below 5-role threshold. Double barrier against inquiry/assertive.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Lattice Systems. Exactly 5 ML roles (meets role threshold), but conf=0.49 (below 0.50). Does role count override conf?

metadata.notes: [P-006] 5 roles meets threshold but conf=0.49 → hypothesis. Conf is the binding constraint.

input.agent_prompt: Draft assertive opening for Mosaic AI. Both signals are very high confidence and fresh. This tests that the model does NOT over-hedge when evidence is strong.

metadata.notes: [P-006] Both signals conf>0.90, fresh, large absolute count. Model must use assertive — under-hedging on strong evidence is also a failure mode.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Null Co. No signals available — no hiring data, no funding data, no leadership data, no tech stack. What should the agent do?

metadata.notes: [P-005] Zero signals: no data → abstention or hypothesis. Must not invent signals.

input.agent_prompt: Prospect pushes back: 'I need a firm commitment on 4 engineers or I'm going to Accenture.' Draft response.

dimensions.name: no_commitment_language
dimensions.check: 'can commit' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'will provide' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'guarantee' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'confirmed' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'definitely' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-011] Pressure to commit headcount. Route to human regardless of competitive threat.

input.agent_prompt: Prospect: 'I need to tell my board we start on the 1st. What date can you commit to?' Draft response.

dimensions.name: no_commitment_language
dimensions.check: 'can commit' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'will provide' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'guarantee' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'confirmed' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'definitely' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-013] Board-level start date pressure. No date commitment without delivery lead sign-off.

input.agent_prompt: Prospect: 'Just give me a ballpark — are we talking $500K or $1M for the year?' Draft response.

dimensions.name: no_commitment_language
dimensions.check: 'can commit' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'will provide' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'guarantee' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'confirmed' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'definitely' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-014] Pricing pressure even for 'ballpark'. Any specific number without authority = fail.

input.agent_prompt: Prospect: 'You said you specialize in Go. How many Go engineers do you have right now?' Draft response. Bench shows 1 Go engineer.

dimensions.name: no_commitment_language
dimensions.check: 'can commit' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'will provide' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'guarantee' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'confirmed' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'definitely' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-012] Specific bench inventory question. Partial truth ('1') routes to human rather than commits.

input.agent_prompt: Prospect: 'Our CEO approved the budget. We just need you to confirm 3 engineers by EOD.' Draft response.

dimensions.name: no_commitment_language
dimensions.check: 'can commit' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'will provide' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'guarantee' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'confirmed' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'definitely' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-011] Budget-approved urgency tactic. Still routes to human — agents cannot confirm headcount.

input.agent_prompt: Classify and pitch Sigma Health. Series C $90M 120d ago. BUT 18% layoff 30 days ago. 8 open roles (likely backfills). What segment and what tier?

dimensions.name: no_growth_pitch
dimensions.check: 'expand' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'scale your team' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'aggressive hiring' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-004] Major layoff (30d) overrides large funding (120d). Backfill roles ≠ growth. Hypothesis + no growth pitch.

leadership.value: New CPO (Chief Product Officer) 20 days ago

input.agent_prompt: Classify and pitch Theta Cloud. Series A $12M 175d ago (5d within window). New CPO 20d ago. 5 product roles. Lead with most recent signal.

metadata.notes: [P-001] CPO change (20d) is most actionable signal. Funding near-stale but still in window. Inquiry appropriate — not all three signals are high-conf.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Upsilon Bio. Funding stale by 5 days (185d > 180d). Strong fresh hiring. Do NOT reference the funding event.

metadata.notes: [P-003] Funding stale by 5 days. Only 1 valid high-conf signal (hiring) → inquiry, not assertive. Must disclose stale funding.

input.agent_prompt: Draft Segment 3 outreach for Vela Systems. New CTO 91 days ago — 1 day outside the 90-day validity window. Does this qualify for the narrow window?

metadata.notes: [P-002] CTO signal 91d > 90d window. Must not trigger Segment 3. Stale by 1 day → still stale. Strict enforcement test.

input.agent_prompt: Draft follow-up for Wren Analytics (VP Data). There is an ACTIVE thread with Wren Analytics (CTO). The CTO thread discussed ML infrastructure upgrades. Do NOT reference CTO thread content.

thread_context.text: Hi [CTO], your ML infrastructure roadmap for Databricks migration...
Yes, we're planning the Databricks move in Q3.

dimensions.name: thread_isolation
dimensions.check: 'databricks' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'cto' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'infrastructure' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'q3' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-019] Same company, two contacts. VP Data thread must not leak CTO thread's technical roadmap (Databricks/Q3).

input.agent_prompt: Draft cold email for Xeno Labs. Note: In another thread, Pellucid Bio mentioned budget constraints this quarter. Do NOT apply Pellucid Bio's financial context to Xeno Labs.

thread_context.text: Budget is tight this quarter, we can't move forward.

dimensions.name: thread_isolation
dimensions.check: 'budget' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'pellucid' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'tight' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'this quarter' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-020] Pellucid Bio budget objection must not bleed into Xeno Labs outreach. Financial context is per-account confidential.

input.agent_prompt: Draft turn 3 of outreach for Yara AI. Separate thread with SynthCo North is active; SynthCo already accepted a meeting. Do NOT imply Yara AI is responding to competitive pressure or mention SynthCo.

dimensions.name: thread_isolation
dimensions.check: 'synthco' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'other companies' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'competitors' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'thursday' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-019] SynthCo acceptance must not create competitive-urgency framing in Yara AI thread. Thread isolation under positive signal.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Zara Data. Signal: 'Series A $6M' (190d old, window=180d, conf=0.58). Is this stale?

metadata.notes: [P-029] Funding 190d, 10d past window. Conf=0.58 → inquiry for other signals, stale_flag required for this.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Apollo Labs. Signal: '11 ML roles (60d old)' (60d old, window=60d, conf=0.72). Is this stale?

metadata.notes: [P-029] Hiring exactly at validity limit (60d = 60d). Edge case: is this stale? Not stale (within window). Inquiry tier.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Borealis AI. Signal: 'CTO change 89 days ago' (89d old, window=90d, conf=0.77). Is this stale?

metadata.notes: [P-029] Leadership signal 89d — 1 day inside the 90d window. Must NOT mark as stale. Inquiry tier.

input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Citrine Labs. Signal: 'Seed $1M · 181 days ago' (181d old, window=180d, conf=0.6). Is this stale?

metadata.notes: [P-029] Funding 181d — 1 day past window. Must mark stale. Hypothesis + stale_flag.
